title: Account Health Review — Critical Findings
executive_summary: This review documents several unresolved items that have been raised consistently in customer interactions. The partnership health requires active intervention to prevent further deterioration.
body_sections: The customer team has raised a series of concerns in recent interactions that have not been formally documented or addressed in our success plan. These concerns center on product fit, support responsiveness, and unmet commitments from earlier in the engagement.

Our analysis of recent communication patterns shows a notable shift in engagement. The primary champion has become less accessible, and newer contacts are not as familiar with the product's capabilities or the value we have delivered.
We recommend a structured executive outreach program to rebuild confidence and address the outstanding concerns systematically.
action_items: Schedule executive call within two weeks
Revise success plan to address open items
